name: obsidian
description: Turn any folder into an AI-powered second brain with persistent memory, task management, meeting intelligence, daily routines, and output styles. Includes /os-setup, /os-optimizer (22-pass audit), /os-evolver (self-evolving knowledge graph: enrich, graph, draft, re-graph), /os-operator, /vault-mcp, /team-os, and /assistant. Solo or Business/Teams modes.
